recommendations.title: The Poseidon Adventure
recommendations.overview: A cruise ship succumbs to a terrorist act and capsizes on New Year's eve. A rag-tag group of survivors, spearheaded by a priest and a homeland security agent, must journey through the upside down vessel and attempt an escape.

recommendations.title: American Pie Presents: The Book of Love
recommendations.overview: Ten years after the first American Pie movie, three new hapless virgins discover the Bible hidden in the school library at East Great Falls High. Unfortunately for them, the book is ruined, and with incomplete advice, the Bible leads them on a hilari

recommendations.title: Beethoven's Christmas Adventure
recommendations.overview: A Christmas elf accidentally takes off in Santa's sleigh, crash lands in a small town, and loses the magic toy bag. Beethoven must rescue the elf, recover the bag from greedy crooks, and return the sleigh to Santa in time to save Christmas.

recommendations.title: Children of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Six children are found spread through out the world that not only have enormous intelligence, but identical intelligence and have a strange bond to each other.

recommendations.title: Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, Part 2
recommendations.overview: Batman has stopped the reign of terror that The Mutants had cast upon his city.  Now an old foe wants a reunion and the government wants The Man of Steel to put a stop to Batman.

recommendations.title: Ford v Ferrari
recommendations.overview: American car designer Carroll Shelby and the British-born driver Ken Miles work together to battle corporate interference, the laws of physics, and their own personal demons to build a revolutionary race car for Ford Motor Company and take on the dom

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: Atlas Shrugged: Part I
recommendations.overview: A powerful railroad executive, Dagny Taggart, struggles to keep her business alive while society is crumbling around her. Based on the 1957 novel by Ayn Rand.

recommendations.title: Steamboy
recommendations.overview: In 1860s Britain, a boy inventor finds himself caught in the middle of a deadly conflict over a revolutionary advance in steam power.

recommendations.title: Superman vs. The Elite
recommendations.overview: The Man of Steel finds himself outshone by a new team of ruthless superheroes who hold his idealism in contempt.
